description: Triggers when the user needs to automate Obsidian tasks using the CLI, shell scripts, or batch operations

queries.query: open today's daily note in Obsidian from the command line
write a script to batch-create meeting notes for all my attendees
automate daily note creation using the Obsidian CLI
archive all inbox notes older than two weeks
obsidian-cli command to append a quick note to my inbox
find all notes in my vault that mention OKR using the command line
batch update the status field in all project notes to done
set up a nightly script to generate a project index note
how do I use the Obsidian Local REST API to create notes programmatically?
move all notes from Inbox to Projects folder in bulk
add frontmatter tags to this note
create a mermaid state diagram for the order lifecycle
optimize my resume for software engineering roles
add wikilinks to the people in this meeting note
create an Excalidraw diagram for the architecture
summarize this YouTube video
write a Python REST API with FastAPI
what is the best Zettelkasten workflow for students?
create a cover letter for this product manager job
transcribe this meeting recording to markdown notes
